calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-23-2015 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-10-2014 Continued To Apr-13-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-15-2014 Set For Trial On Aug-11-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-12-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT 1340 HUDSON AVENUE, L.P. DBA JACKIE ROBINSON's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR per request of the moving party. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-19-2013 Continued To Jan-29-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-31-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jessica L. Marinelli, Esq. of Littler Mendelson, (415-288-6368), for John Stewart Company, Defendant and moving party.
Mona A. Sanaei, Esq. of Pocklington Law Offices, (925-295-0705), for Lisa Johnson, Plaintiff and opposing party.

ARGUED. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to the 4th cause of action. No opposition filed. Demurrer is overruled as to the 6th, 7th, 9th and 10th causes of action to the extent they are alleged by Plaintiffs solely as tenants against Defendant solely as landlord. Prevailing party to prepare order approved as to form. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-16-2013 Continued To Oct-31-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: MONA A-SANAEI, ESQ., 925.295.0705, FOR PLAINTIFFS LISA JOHNSON AND OSCAR GOMEZ.
JESSICA MARINELLI, ESQ., 415.288.6368, FOR DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY.

RULING: NO ARGUMENT. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is transferred to Department 501, the Real Property/Housing Court, to be heard on October 31, 2013, at 9:30 am. See San Francisco Local Rule 8.10. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-30-2013 Continued To Dec-04-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-16-2013 Continued To Oct-16-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jessica L. Marinelli, Esq. of Littler Mendelson, PC, Tel. 415.288.6368, for defendant and moving party;
Daniel T. Pocklington, Esq. of Pocklington Law Offices, Tel. 925.295.0705, for plaintiffs and opposing party.

Judge Miller disclosed at the hearing that she knows John Stewart but is not social friends with him. Judge Miller does not believe that this would affect her ability to be fair and impartial in this case. No objections were raised.

RULING: The matter was discussed. Per the stipulated request of parties, the Court modified its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to October 16, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 on the Court's own motion. Opposing party failed to provide courtesy copies as required by Local Rule 2.6B and the court's order issued on July 12, 2013. Moving party and opposing party provided courtesy copies of their documents at the hearing. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-12-2013 Continued To Sep-16-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to September 16, 2013, to give the opposing party a chance to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. The opposing party shall provide a courtesy copy of its papers with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date by July 31, 2013. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)
